hooks.command: $FACTORY_PROJECT_DIR/echo 'obsidian-shiki-plugin harness active | Desktop + Mobile emulation | MCPs: obsidian-cli, electron-devtools'
$FACTORY_PROJECT_DIR/git diff --name-only | grep '\.ts$' >/dev/null && bun run typecheck || true
$FACTORY_PROJECT_DIR/echo 'Executing bash command. Avoid destructive operations on dist/ and exampleVault/'
